""" return render( subject, style_mix=self. style_mix, format="vertical luxury music infographic poster", typography=""" large title: [musical subject] subtitle: [composer / genre / key / period] microtext: [chord symbols / tempo / motifs / lyric fragments under fair use / measure notes] """, composition=""" architectural central structure with notation, waveforms, harmonic maps, and instrument sections arranged around it. """, lighting=""" warm stage glow, polished wood reflections, subtle gold notation lines.
